current_commit_message: deleted the dag file which has the function for visualizing modules and relocated that function inside node.py as a Module method. this way we got rid the import statement in the middle of node.py
Implement density and log_density methods for EmpiricalDistribution with Gaussian approximation and update tests accordingly
Fix issubclass TypeError on Python 3.10 with generic aliases

- At the start of _broadcast in Workflow, check that n_broadcast_samples is an integer and above a minimum threshold (e.g., 5). - If it's below the threshold, issue a warnings.warn with stacklevel=2 so it points to the caller's frame.
Make PRNG key optional in sample() and from_distribution()
Add _from_distribution hook so base class handles key and support check
Fix broadcast enumerate reconnection bug and improve test coverage
Refactor constraint compatibility to use partial order with cached transitive closure
Clean up Node class: remove redundant constructor args, rewrite docstring
Add expectation() method and is_approximate tracking (issue #27)
Add BootstrapDistribution, return_dist support, and MC fallback for mean/variance/cov
Suppress known TFP-internal warnings at package import
